# fp-context

AI grounding hub for Team Foreldrepenger. Markdown-only repo, no build/test.

## When editing here

- Primary audience for content is AI assistants, not humans
- Optimize for tokens: tables > bullets > code > prose
- Stay within length budgets in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Link to authoritative sources — do not embed them
- One topic per file; split rather than grow
- Update [README.md](../README.md) index when adding a file

## See also

- [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) — autonomous agent workflow
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) — length budgets, style rules, review checklist
- Space TeamForeldrepenger
